meta.description: Telegram-to-RSS aggregator config — balanced geopolitics channels
meta.note: Channels tagged with view: official (gov/state) or aggregator (media/OSINT). Slot 20 reserved.

mega_feed.title: Geopolitics Mega-Feed
mega_feed.description: Combined feed from all monitored Telegram channels covering global affairs, conflicts, diplomacy, and policy.

channels.title: Russian MFA (Official)
channels.description: Official Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs — Russian-language diplomatic statements, briefings, policy positions.

channels.title: RT English (Official)
channels.description: RT English official Telegram — international news from Russian state-funded perspective.

channels.title: Intel Slava Z
channels.description: Geopolitics and conflict analysis — pro-Russia leaning but widely cited as essential OSINT source.

channels.title: Ukraine MFA (Official)
channels.description: Official Ukrainian Ministry of Foreign Affairs — statements, humanitarian updates, diplomatic positions.

channels.title: Israel MFA (Official)
channels.description: Official Israel Ministry of Foreign Affairs — policy statements, security updates, diplomatic affairs.

channels.title: US Department of State
channels.description: US State Department official Telegram — briefings, sanctions, travel advisories, policy announcements.

channels.title: European Commission (Official)
channels.description: European Commission official — EU policy, regulations, trade, foreign affairs statements.

channels.title: CGTN (Official Chinese State)
channels.description: CGTN official — Chinese state perspective on international affairs, BRI, trade, Asia-Pacific.

channels.title: BRICS News
channels.description: BRICS bloc and emerging markets — policy, economy, multilateral diplomacy, de-dollarization.

channels.title: Dragon Watch
channels.description: China geopolitics focus — BRI developments, Taiwan dynamics, South China Sea, tech competition.

channels.title: Clash Report
channels.description: Live conflict tracking and policy updates — fast-breaking global events, multi-theater coverage.

channels.title: AMK Mapping
channels.description: Geopolitical mapping and military/policy developments — visual situation reports, frontline updates.

channels.title: New York Times (Official)
channels.description: NYT official Telegram — international affairs, investigations, policy analysis.

channels.title: Disclose.tv
channels.description: Global events and alternative policy angles — fast aggregation, wide-net coverage.

channels.title: Military Summary
channels.description: Security and military analysis with policy context — daily summaries, theater-by-theater breakdowns.

channels.title: IAEA (Official)
channels.description: International Atomic Energy Agency official — nuclear monitoring, Iran deal updates, safeguards reports.

channels.title: United Nations (Official)
channels.description: United Nations official — Security Council resolutions, humanitarian statements, multilateral diplomacy.

channels.title: NATO Press (Official)
channels.description: NATO official press — alliance statements, Middle East posture, sanctions, security policy.

channels.title: Kremlin (Official English)
channels.description: Kremlin official English channel — Putin statements, Russia-Iran relations, foreign policy positions.

channels.title: IDF (Official)
channels.description: Israel Defense Forces official — strike confirmations, interception data, military communiqués.

channels.title: US State Dept (Spox)
channels.description: US State Department spokesperson — press briefings, sanctions announcements, Iran policy statements.

channels.title: Saudi MFA (English)
channels.description: Saudi Arabia MFA English channel — Gulf security, Iran-Saudi relations, Arab League positions.

channels.title: Chinese MFA Spokesperson
channels.description: China MFA English briefings — China-Iran strategic partnership, UNSC vetoes, sanctions opposition.

channels.title: French MFA (Official)
channels.description: France MFA — E3 nuclear talks, EU-Iran diplomacy, French positions on Iran sanctions.

channels.title: UK Foreign Office (FCDO)
channels.description: UK FCDO — Iran sanctions, British hostage cases, E3 coordination, UNSC statements.

channels.title: UAE Ministry of Foreign Affairs
channels.description: UAE MoFA — UAE-Iran diplomatic outreach, GCC security, Gulf stability statements.

channels.title: Qatar Ministry of Foreign Affairs
channels.description: Qatar MoFA — Iran-West back-channel mediation, prisoner swaps, indirect talks outcomes.

channels.title: UN News Centre
channels.description: UN News Centre — UNSC resolutions on Iran, Secretary-General statements, IAEA reports.

channels.title: OSINTdefender
channels.description: Best English-language OSINT channel — satellite imagery, flight tracking, ship tracking for Iran war.

channels.title: War Monitor
channels.description: High-volume multi-conflict war news aggregator — English, 24/7 during escalations.

channels.title: Middle East Eye
channels.description: London-based independent Iran coverage — exclusive reporting, Iranian civil society, back-channel diplomacy.

channels.title: Iran International
channels.description: Most important Persian-language Iran news channel — breaks inside-Iran stories, protests, IRGC movements.

channels.title: Al Arabiya English
channels.description: Fast-breaking Gulf war news — Iranian strikes, Houthi attacks, Gulf security incidents.

channels.title: Al Jazeera English
channels.description: Al Jazeera Telegram — credible Arab broadcaster, balanced Iran-Israel coverage, ground correspondents.

channels.title: Times of Israel
channels.description: Fastest English Israeli outlet — breaking news on Iranian launches, Israeli responses, political developments.

channels.title: Iran Observer
channels.description: Iran-focused OSINT channel — 17/20 recent posts match Iran keywords. Covers IRGC, nuclear, sanctions, protests.
